name: Reese's Peanut Butter & Hershey's Kisses Layer Pie
recipeIngredient: -and pie filling mix (do not use instant pudding)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove wrappers from chocolate pieces.
2. In a small microwave-safe bowl, place chocolate pieces and 2 tablespoons whipping cream. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 minute or until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth when stirred.
3. Spread the chocolate mixture over the bottom of the baked pie crust; refrigerate 30 minutes or until set.
4. In a 2-quart saucepan, place pudding mix and peanut butter. Using a whisk, gradually blend in milk, stirring until smooth. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until pudding thickens and boils; remove from heat.
5. Cool for 10 minutes, stirring frequently. Pour the pudding over the chocolate mixture in the pie crust.
6. Refrigerate several hours or until firm.
7. In a small mixer bowl, beat the remaining whipped cream, powdered sugar, and vanilla until stiff. Spread over the top of the pie.
8. Garnish with additional chocolate pieces, if desired. Cover; refrigerate leftover pie.
